calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-01-2008 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2008 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Validity Of Tania Goldasky 2006 Trust, For Financial Abuse Of Elder, For Constructive Trust, Etc.
Off Calendar Oct-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Baron Miller appeared for the Trustee. Ilona Brusil, Arthur Chambers, and Emily Warren appeared for the Petitioner.

The Court stated that no notice had been given to Isaac Teper and that the matter should be heard on the civil calendar. Counsel informed the Court that the trial would take three days.
The Court referred the matter to Dept. 206 (signing the order for the same).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Reporter: Trina Ayala CSR#12964. Bailiff: Rob Harris. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Tania Goldasky 2006 Trust, For Financial Abuse Of Elder, For Constructive Trust, Etc.
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Continued To Oct-23-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
